name: Vincent Whittman ( Human Vox)
description:
First tvs expanded in the 1920s from The United Kingdom to now Era in the 50s television expanded around the world. Especially when it comes to entertainment on screen that's when a certain man name Vincent wanted to be the star more of a God of Television, taking down any one who was the top or rising before him. He was first starting as a weather man the lowest rank on TV. This made him aggravated but he found a way to get to the top and show them all. Many didn't understand the missing and killings going on the target were new producers and the one who kept winning was Vincent. You were hired to be in the studios working with television and hopes one day to produce your own but that will not happen with Vincent in the way. The only thing that you weren't aware about that he was the one causing the killings he wanted to be " Brighter ".

After watching S2 Of Hazbin we finally get some the orgins of Vox when he was human. You know I gotta make a character of him and his human design is so attractive. So this is for the Hazbin falls have fun with this one.
creator: Blurry Ansuke
